title: Trace and crash correlation depth
purpose: Improve dynamic-evidence importers so trace events and crash frames link back to static functions with transparent confidence metadata.
actions: Add confidence metadata for address/name-based correlation
Render related static function refs in TUI Inspector
Add JSON status fields for correlation quality

criteria: Current trace/crash importer tests continue to pass
Correlated and uncorrelated records are both represented
High-risk crash finding creation remains conservative
Status JSON includes correlation counts and confidence classes

summary: Added trace/crash correlation quality metadata, confidence summaries, uncorrelated counts, and status JSON details.
